attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID
,COALESCE(CAST(NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS CISCO_BOOKED_DATE /* Check with Business team on this */
,NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER        
,COALESCE(NPOS.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,'POS' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,'NEW' AS OPERATION
,COALESCE(TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,-9999) AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  
,COALESCE(CAST(NPOS.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)),CAST('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NULLIFZERO(NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE)),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM(TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT / NULLIFZERO(NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE)),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NULLIFZERO(NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE)) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NULLIFZERO(NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE)) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NULLIFZERO(NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE)) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,COALESCE(SUM (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NULLIFZERO(NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE)) 
	END       ),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
--,MAX(TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,INCR1.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(SELECT   BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX 
WHERE  TRX.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD ='POS'
AND TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'  
GROUP BY 1, 2
) INCR,  /* WI_ERP_INCR */
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX ,
(select MAX(EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) as EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 
from (select EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX group by 1) A) INCR1,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS ,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
WHERE 1=1   
AND INCR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT =TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   
AND INCR.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD =TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD   
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD = 'POS'
AND TRX.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND (NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID                     IS NOT NULL and  trim(NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID) <> '-9999')
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW Distribution')
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,24

SELECT
 NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID
,Coalesce(Cast(NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)),Cast('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS CISCO_BOOKED_DATE /* Check with Business team on this */
,NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER        
,Coalesce(NPOS.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,'POS' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,'NEW' AS OPERATION
,Coalesce(TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,-9999) AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  
,Coalesce(Cast(NPOS.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)),Cast('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT / NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
--,MAX(TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,INCR1.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(SELECT   BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX 
WHERE  TRX.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD ='DSV_BKG'
AND TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'  
GROUP BY 1, 2
/* Added Union as part of SFP Rel */
UNION  
SELECT   BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,'DSV_BKG' AS DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE BKG_POS 
WHERE BKG_POS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate'  
GROUP BY 1, 2
) INCR,  /* WI_ERP_INCR */
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX ,
(SELECT Max(EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 
FROM (SELECT EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX GROUP BY 1) A) INCR1,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS ,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
WHERE 1=1   
AND INCR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT =TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   
AND INCR.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD =TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD   
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD = 'DSV_BKG'
AND TRX.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND (NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID                     IS NOT NULL AND  Trim(NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID) <> '-9999')
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW Distribution')
AND NPOS.NET_PRICE_FLG <> 'Y'  /* Added as part of SFP Rel */              
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,24 
  
UNION ALL

/* Added new Union as part of SFP Rel */  
SELECT
 NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID AS DEAL_ID
,Coalesce(Cast(NPOS.POS_TRX_LINE_POSTED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)),Cast('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS CISCO_BOOKED_DATE /* Check with Business team on this */
,NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AS SALES_ORDER_NUMBER        
,Coalesce(NPOS.BK_LOCAL_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,'POS' AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,'NEW' AS OPERATION
,Coalesce(TRX.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,-9999) AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE  
,Coalesce(Cast(NPOS.LAST_SOURCE_UPDATE_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0)),Cast('3500/01/01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS ORDER_CREATION_DATE
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT),0) AS ORDER_USD_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum(TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT / NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE),0) AS ORDER_LOCAL_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='N' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0) AS PRODUCT_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_LOCAL_NET_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT) 
	END       ),0) AS SERVICE_USD_LIST_AMOUNT
,Coalesce(Sum (CASE        
	WHEN TRX.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG='Y' THEN (TRX.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT/NPOS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE) 
	END       ),0)  AS SERVICE_LOCAL_LIST_AMOUNT
,Current_Timestamp(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
--,MAX(TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,INCR1.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM 
(SELECT   BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX 
WHERE  TRX.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD            IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD ='DSV_POS'
AND TRX.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME > '$$LastExtractDate'  
GROUP BY 1, 2
) INCR,  /* WI_ERP_INCR */
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX ,
(SELECT Max(EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME1 
FROM (SELECT EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS TRX GROUP BY 1) A) INCR1,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPOS ,
$$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY RSH 
WHERE 1=1   
AND INCR.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT =TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT   
AND INCR.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD =TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD   
AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=TRX.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND TRX.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NPOS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND TRX.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD = 'DSV_POS'
AND TRX.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD IN ('STANDALONE','BUNDLE')
AND (NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID                     IS NOT NULL AND  Trim(NPOS.BK_DEAL_ID) <> '-9999')
AND RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW Distribution')
AND NPOS.NET_PRICE_FLG  ='Y'   
AND NPOS.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG  ='N'                 
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,21,22,24
